name: Weekly EU AI Compliance Brief — auto-draft Sunday, send Monday 8am UK

values.content:
=You are Nicholas Templeman writing the EU AI Compliance Brief #N. Style: dry, factual, no hype, no emojis. Audience: UK + EU compliance officers, AI startup founders.

This week's regulatory inputs:

EUR-Lex AI Act updates:
{{$node['Fetch EUR-Lex AI Act updates'].json.text || $node['Fetch EUR-Lex AI Act updates'].json}}

UK DSIT news:
{{$node['Fetch DSIT news (UK)'].json.text || $node['Fetch DSIT news (UK)'].json}}

ICO news:
{{$node['Fetch ICO news'].json.text || $node['Fetch ICO news'].json}}

Write the issue with this exact structure:

Line 1: 'EU AI Compliance Brief #N — Monday DD Month YYYY'
Line 2: blank
Line 3-5: One-paragraph TL;DR (≤50 words)
Line 6: blank
Line 7: '## What changed this week'
Line 8-12: 3 bullet points, each (a) what changed, (b) which Article/regulation, (c) what to do (1 sentence)
Line 13: blank
Line 14: '## This week's practical tip'
Line 15-18: One concrete this-week action (≤80 words)
Line 19: blank
Line 20: '## One resource'
Line 21-22: One paid MEOK resource link with 1-sentence relevance

Keep total length 300-400 words. No fluff. No marketing tone.

parameters.subject: 📰 EU AI Compliance Brief — Sunday draft for Monday send
parameters.html:
=

This week's brief — review + edit before Monday 8am UK

Action required: review below, edit if needed, paste into Buttondown by Monday 7:30am UK.

{{$json.draft}}

To paste into Buttondown: buttondown.email/emails/new → newsletter dropdown → 'EU AI Compliance Brief'

nodes.name: Email Sunday draft to Nick for edit

main.node: Email Sunday draft to Nick for edit

_meok_notes.purpose: Auto-draft the weekly EU AI Compliance Brief every Sunday afternoon. Email lands in Nick's inbox by Sunday evening — he reviews/edits/sends on Monday 8am UK.
_meok_notes.Buttondown_send: Manual paste step on Monday morning (~10 min). Could fully automate via Buttondown API if Nick wants a fully-hands-off newsletter, but founder-edit step strongly recommended for first ~10 issues.
_meok_notes.expected_outcome: Compounding subscriber base + topical authority on EU AI compliance. Net new subs of 20-50/week once distribution is established.
